positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of an abstract forest scene at dawn. Features clean, bold silhouettes of diverse, stylized trees (pines, oaks, weeping willows) arranged in a visually balanced, slightly asymmetrical pattern. The composition should focus on negative space, with strong contrast between the deep midnight blue/indigo sky and the crisp, lime-green and burnt-orange backlit foliage. Use thick, graphic line work and areas of flat color wash, evoking a retro woodcut or linocut style. The arrangement should be suitable for a repeat pattern or a central chest graphic on apparel. High saturation, clean edges, vector graphic quality, maximalist simplicity, symmetrical yet dynamic composition, printed on an off-white background.
